name: image_to_image
description: Transform an existing image using a text prompt as guidance. The 'strength' parameter controls how much the output deviates from the input: lower values (0.1-0.3) make subtle changes, higher values (0.7-1.0) produce more dramatic transformations. Useful for style transfer, artistic modifications, and iterative refinement. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The source image to transform (multipart form upload). Supported formats: png, jpeg, webp.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Text description guiding how the image should be transformed.

parameters.name: strength
parameters.description: How much to transform the image (0.0 to 1.0). Lower values stay closer to the original, higher values allow more change (default 0.5).

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what to exclude from the output image.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducible results (0 to 4294967294).

body.prompt: Transform this photo into a Studio Ghibli anime style illustration, soft pastel colors, hand-drawn feel

response_example.body: (binary image data in the requested format)
